response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across many years but lacks the Principal/Director-level scope, recognized AI expertise, and demonstrated AI products/platforms required for this strategic IC role. Current title is Staff/Senior, not Principal, and AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work rather than leading AI strategy or building AI platforms.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, teaching, open-source founder of GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale or recognized AI expertise required for Principal AI Strategy role
Career trajectory at Senior/Staff IC level, not Director-level scope or executive-customer advisory experience
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) versus the cloud/AI strategy fluency expected

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-product portfolio
Seniority mismatch with Principal/Director IC level
